Summary.description: I'm a frontend developer with hands-on commercial experience building responsive, accessible, and modern web interfaces. I work daily with React, Next.js, TypeScript, Redux Toolkit, and Tailwind CSS, and have delivered production applications for the online gaming industry and a long-term CRM platform. I care about clean, maintainable code, solid architecture (FSD, SOLID, DRY), and great UI/UX.

Contact.title: Let's work together
Contact.description: I'm excited to hear about your project! Share some details below, and let's start working together to create something amazing.

experience.title: My experience
experience.description: I'm a frontend developer with commercial experience delivering production-grade, responsive web applications. My background spans interactive products for the online gaming industry, a long-term CRM platform, and 12+ self-directed projects built with modern technologies. You can explore my work in detail in the Work section, including live demos and GitHub repositories.

technologies: Interactive web apps for the online gaming industry — high-performance, real-time interfaces; collaboration with designers, backend & QA

Front-end of a long-term CRM web app for a small business, working in a team under senior developer guidance (agile workflow, GitHub code reviews) — data-heavy interfaces (charts, tables, filters), forms & validation
Independent development of varied web apps — news app, quote manager, portfolio, Trello-like task manager, e-commerce & landing pages

0.degree: The Ultimate React Course: React, Next.js, Redux & More

1.degree: Independent study – documentation, YouTube tutorials, practice projects, supplemented with mentoring from an experienced developer

2.institution: Vinnytsia Institute of Trade and Economics of Kyiv National University of Trade and Economics
2.degree: Master’s Degree in Management of Trade Organizations

about.title: About me
about.description:
Frontend developer with commercial experience building modern, responsive web applications using React, Next.js, TypeScript, Redux Toolkit, and Tailwind CSS.

I write clean, maintainable code and follow proven engineering principles such as SOLID, DRY, and Clean Architecture, applying Feature-Sliced Design (FSD) on large-scale codebases. I'm comfortable working both independently and in a team, including commercial work on production CRM systems and interactive products for the online gaming industry.

I also have working knowledge of backend fundamentals with Node.js and Express, and have built a REST API for a Trello-like task management system (boards, columns, cards).

I'm a fast learner with strong attention to detail and a growth mindset, continuously sharpening my skills toward becoming a full-stack developer.

skills.title: My skills
skills.description: Here are the technologies I use to build modern web applications.

0.title: House CRM
0.description: A commercial team project for real estate management, developed alongside experienced developers. Working within the FSD (Feature-Sliced Design) architecture allowed me to master professional standards for building scalable applications within a monorepo. I was responsible for the frontend implementation using Next.js 16, RTK Query for state management, and TanStack Table for advanced data handling. The system features visual analytics (Recharts), automated PDF documentation, and a modern UI built with Shadcn UI and Framer Motion. The codebase adheres to strict quality standards (ESLint 9, Husky, lint-staged) and is verified with Vitest and Playwright. While I am not the owner, the repository owner (https://github.com/San88Francisco) officially confirms my participation and can provide recommendations. Live preview: https://houses-crm.vercel.app (Login: user@example.com / Password: string).

1.title: Andrii Portfolio
1.description: A personal portfolio website built with Next.js 16, React 19, and TypeScript 5.9. Styled with Tailwind CSS 4, Radix UI, and Framer Motion. Features include internationalization with next-intl, form validation via Zod and React Hook Form, and toast notifications with Sonner. This project demonstrates my ability to build clean, modern, and production-ready applications.

2.title: News Reactfy
2.description: A feature-rich news application built with React and TypeScript. Users can browse articles, filter by category, search, and switch between light and dark modes. The project uses Redux Toolkit for state management, Axios for API calls, and custom hooks for advanced logic. It demonstrates practical experience in scalable and interactive React applications.

3.title: Quotes App
3.description: A quote management application built with Next.js and TypeScript. Users can search, add, edit, and delete quotes through a REST API. The UI is styled with Tailwind CSS and ShadCN UI, with error handling via React Toastify. Unit tests are implemented using Jest, ensuring reliability and maintainability.

4.title: Get Task Driver
4.description: A Trello-like task management app built with React, TypeScript, and Redux. Users can create lists, add tasks, set deadlines, mark completion, and manage multiple boards. The UI uses Material UI and Framer Motion for smooth interactions. Authentication is handled with JWT, with unit tests and Storybook snapshots for quality assurance.

5.title: Book Library App
5.description: An online book library application with search and filtering functionality. It was first built with classic Redux and later refactored to Redux Toolkit for better structure. The backend is a simple Express server, with Axios handling data requests and Toastify showing notifications. This project demonstrates both legacy and modern state management approaches.

6.title: Shop store
6.description: A collaborative e-commerce jewelry shop built entirely with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. The project includes a fully custom shopping cart powered by LocalStorage and responsive UI elements. I contributed to UI implementation, form handling, and planning of app structure. It demonstrates teamwork, GitHub collaboration, and development without frameworks.

7.title: Home Pro
7.description: A responsive landing page for a home service company designed in Figma. It includes scroll-triggered animations, a content slider, and an accordion component. Built with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, styled using BEM methodology. This project highlights clean responsive layout and interactive UI development.

8.title: Farm Vest
8.description: A responsive landing page showcasing agricultural investment opportunities. It features engaging animations, parallax effects, and a modern UI design. Developed with HTML, CSS, Sass, and JavaScript, styled with BEM methodology. The project demonstrates smooth interactions and attention to visual details.

9.title: GoCorona
9.description: A health awareness landing page with a responsive design and modern layout. It includes animations, smooth navigation, and interactive elements for user engagement. The project was built with HTML, CSS, Sass, and JavaScript, structured with BEM and automated using Gulp. It demonstrates solid knowledge of UI design and frontend fundamentals.

10.title: Finance
10.description: A financial services landing page with a professional and minimal UI design. It features responsive layout, smooth navigation, and clean visual presentation. Built with HTML, CSS, Sass, and JavaScript, styled using BEM methodology and designed in Figma. The project emphasizes detail-oriented design and polished frontend delivery.

11.title: INTERIA
11.description: A financial services landing page with a professional and minimal UI design. It features responsive layout, smooth navigation, and clean visual presentation. Built with HTML, CSS, Sass, and JavaScript, styled using BEM methodology and designed in Figma. The project emphasizes detail-oriented design and polished frontend delivery.
